samples.xml_description:
<module id="freq_div">
    <description>Generate clock signals with frequencies that are integer division of the input clock.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="CLK_in">Input clock signal.</input>
        <input id="RST">Reset signal.</input>
        <output id="CLK_50">Output clock signal with a frequency of CLK_in divided by 2.</output>
        <output id="CLK_10">Output clock signal with a frequency of CLK_in divided by 10.</output>
        <output id="CLK_1">Output clock signal with a frequency of CLK_in divided by 100.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <parameter id="Input Clock Frequency">The frequency of the input clock signal.</parameter>
        <parameter id="First Divider">The first clock signal.</parameter>
        <parameter id="Second Divider">The second clock signal.</parameter>
        <parameter id="Third Divider">The third clock signal.</parameter>
    </parameter_description>
    <logic_description>
        <sequential_logic id="first">
            <description>
                <statement>On every positive edge of CLK_in or RST, if RST is active, </statement>
                <statement>CLK_50 is set to 0. Otherwise, CLK_50 is toggled by inverting its current value.</statement>
            </description>
            <output id="CLK_50"/>
            <input id="CLK_in"/>
            <input id="RST"/>
        </sequential_logic>
        <sequential_logic id="second">
            <description>
                <statement>On every positive edge of CLK_in or RST, if RST is active, </statement>
                <statement>CLK_10 is set to 0, and the counter cnt_10 is reset to 0.</statement>
                <statement>If the counter cnt_10 reaches a value of 4, </statement>
                <statement>CLK_10 is toggled by inverting its current value, </statement>
                <statement>and the counter cnt_10 is reset to 0.</statement>
                <statement>Otherwise, the counter cnt_10 is incremented by 1.</statement>
            </description>
            <output id="CLK_10"/>
            <input id="CLK_in"/>
            <input id="RST"/>
        </sequential_logic>
        <sequential_logic id="third">
            <description>
                <statement>On every positive edge of CLK_in or RST, if RST is active, </statement>
                <statement>CLK_1 is set to 0, and the counter cnt_100 is reset to 0.</statement>
                <statement>If the counter cnt_100 reaches a value of 49, </statement>
                <statement>CLK_1 is toggled by inverting its current value, </statement>
                <statement>and the counter cnt_100 is reset to 0.</statement>
                <statement>Otherwise, the counter cnt_100 is incremented by 1.</statement>
            </description>
            <output id="CLK_1"/>
            <input id="CLK_in"/>
            <input id="RST"/>
        </sequential_logic>
    </logic_description>
    <task>
        <description>Generate clock signals with frequencies that are integer division of the input clock.</description>
        <trigger>
            <event>On every positive edge of CLK_in or RST.</event>
        </trigger>
        <action>
            <if>
                <condition>RST is active.</condition>
                <true>
                    <statement>Set CLK_50 to 0.</statement>
                </true>
            </if>
            <else>
                <statement>Toggle CLK_50 by inverting its current value.</statement>
            </else>
            <if>
                <condition>RST is active.</condition>
                <true>
                    <statement>Set CLK_10 to 0.</statement>
                    <statement>Set cnt_10 to 0.</statement>
                </true>
                <false>
                    <if>
                        <condition>cnt_10 reaches a value of 4.</condition>
                        <true>
                            <statement>Toggle CLK_10 by inverting its current value.</statement>
                            <statement>Set cnt_10 to 0.</statement>
                        </true>
                        <false>
                            <statement>Increment cnt_10 by 1.</statement>
                        </false>
                    </if>
                </false>
            </if>
            <if>
                <condition>RST is active.</condition>
                <true>
                    <statement>Set CLK_1 to 0.</statement>
                    <statement>Set cnt_100 to 0.</statement>
                </true>
                <false>
                    <if>
                        <condition>cnt_100 reaches a value of 49.</condition>
                        <true>
                            <statement>Toggle CLK_1 by inverting its current value.</statement>
                            <statement>Set cnt_100 to 0.</statement>
                        </true>
                        <false>
                            <statement>Increment cnt_100 by 1.</statement>
                        </false>
                    </if>
                </false>
            </if>
        </action>
    </task>
</module>
